description_long: This street light features a robust, vertical metal pole with a square base for stability, supporting two horizontally extending arms. Each arm holds a box-shaped lantern with frosted glass panels and metallic frames, emitting a soft, diffused light. The lanterns are suspended from decorative hooks, adding a touch of classic elegance to the design. The pole itself is adorned with subtle horizontal bands and a slightly flared top, giving it a refined yet utilitarian appearance. The overall color palette consists of dark bronze or black metal with warm, off-white lanterns. This design is well-suited for urban streetscapes, parks, or pedestrian walkways, blending both functional illumination and aesthetic appeal.
description: A dual-arm street light with box-shaped lanterns suspended from decorative hooks on a sturdy, banded metal pole with a square base. The lanterns feature frosted glass panels and emit a warm, diffused glow.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns symmetrically suspended from curved arms, highlighting the boxy lantern design and decorative hooks.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the lanterns and the thickness of the pole, with one lantern more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both lanterns and the pole's subtle banding and structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the profile of the lanterns and the arm structure, with the square base visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Box-shaped lanterns with frosted glass panels and metallic frames, suspended from decorative hooks; lantern-style with a classic, geometric appearance.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Subtle horizontal bands and a slightly flared top; otherwise plain.
